completedWork: RLC Bandpass Filter Simulation - NEW: Interactive RLC bandpass filter with frequency response visualization. Features real-time Bode plot showing magnitude vs frequency, center frequency calculation (f₀ = 1/(2π√LC)), bandwidth and Q factor calculations, interactive R, L, C sliders, passband highlight with -3dB cutoff points, circuit diagram with SVG visualization, and comprehensive educational content on filter theory including practical applications and design considerations.

Battery Pack Designer Calculator - NEW: Series and parallel battery pack configuration calculator. Support for 18650 (3.7V, 2.5Ah), 21700 (3.7V, 4.2Ah), 26650 LiFePO4 (3.2V, 3.2Ah), and custom cells. Two configuration modes: by number of cells or by target voltage/capacity. Calculates total voltage, capacity, energy (Wh), and runtime based on load current. Visual battery pack diagram showing cell arrangement (up to 5×10 grid display), common configuration examples (3S1P for drones, 10S3P for e-bikes, 96S50P for EVs), and comprehensive educational content on series/parallel connections, energy calculations, and safety considerations.
